name: DimensionStyle.TextFit
summary: Text display position inside or outside extension lines

enum_values.name: Auto
enum_values.summary: Auto - Display inside when space permits

enum_values.name: TextRight
enum_values.summary: Force text outside to the right of extensions

enum_values.name: TextLeft
enum_values.summary: Force text outside to the left of extensions

enum_values.name: TextHintRight
enum_values.summary: Move text outside to the right of extensions when it won't fit inside

enum_values.name: TextHintLeft
enum_values.summary: Move text outside to the left of extensions when it won't fit inside
